svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="sil-harness" name="SIL Test Harness Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="-475" dy="-153" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="550" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="SIL Test Harness Architecture" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="10" width="500" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="container" value="Docker Container (sentinel-sil)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=5;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="45" width="840" height="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linux_vm" value="QEMU Linux VM (aarch64)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=3;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="80" width="250" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linux_gw" value="sentinel-gw
process" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="70" y="115" width="100" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linux_yocto" value="Yocto Linux
(Poky)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="115" width="100" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linux_ip" value="192.168.7.1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#6c8ebf;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="170" width="90" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linux_serial" value="Serial: ttyAMA0" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="190" width="100" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linux_qmp" value="QMP: :4444" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="190" width="80" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu_vm" value="QEMU MCU VM (ARM)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=3;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="260" width="250" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu_fw" value="sentinel-mcu
firmware" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="70" y="295" width="100" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu_baremetal" value="Bare-metal
(lwIP + nanopb)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="295" width="100" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu_ip" value="192.168.7.2" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#6c8ebf;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="350" width="90" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu_serial" value="Serial: console" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="370" width="100" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu_qmp" value="QMP: :4445" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="370" width="80" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bridge" value="br-sentinel
(Linux bridge)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="130" y="430" width="140" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tap_gw" style="strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="linux_vm" target="bridge" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tap_gw_l" value="tap-gw" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="tap_gw" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tap_mcu" style="strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="mcu_vm" target="bridge" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tap_mcu_l" value="tap-mcu" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="tap_mcu" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="observer" value="Test Observer" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=3;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="370" y="80" width="230" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tcp_probe" value="TCP Probe
(5000, 5001, 5002)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="385" y="110" width="95" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="log_scraper" value="Log Scraper
(serial output)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="490" y="110" width="95" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fault_inj" value="Fault Injector
(QMP commands)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="385" y="165" width="95" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qemu_mon" value="QEMU Monitor
(power cycle)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="490" y="165" width="95" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pytest" value="Pytest Runner" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=3;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="370" y="260" width="230" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conftest" value="conftest.py
(QEMU fixtures)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="385" y="290" width="95" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tests" value="test_startup.py
test_telemetry.py
test_actuator.py
test_failsafe.py" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="490" y="290" width="95" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="test_config" value="test_config.py
test_diagnostics.py" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="385" y="340" width="95" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="results" value="Results" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=3;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="660" y="80" width="190" height="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="junit" value="junit.xml" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="115" width="150" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="timing" value="timing.csv" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="150" width="150" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="serial_log" value="serial_linux.log
serial_mcu.log" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="185" width="150" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="coverage" value="coverage.json" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="230" width="150" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="summary" value="summary.md" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="265" width="150" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="obs_linux" style="strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="observer" target="linux_vm" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="obs_mcu" style="strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="observer" target="mcu_vm" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pytest_obs" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="pytest" target="observer" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pytest_res" style="strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="pytest" target="results" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pytest_bridge" style="strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="pytest" target="bridge" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pytest_bridge_l" value="192.168.7.100" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#9673a6;" parent="pytest_bridge" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
